title: SACRAMENTO, CA- As part of her continued efforts to help her constituents in Lake County,
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California State Budget allocated $1.88 million for the Blue Ribbon Committee for the Rehabilitation of Clear Lake.",
    "The funding includes $780,000 to the Natural Resources Agency and $1.1 million to the University of California, Davis for BRC-approved projects.",
    "These projects are critical to Lake County’s economy, ecosystem, and heritage.",
    "California has made nearly $3 million in state funding investments to improve the health of Clear Lake.",
    "New funding will support locally designed projects aimed at improving water quality in Clear Lake.",
    "Investments in the 2023 Budget Act will improve habitat for the threatened Clear Lake hitch.",
    "The Adobe Creek Hydrology and Groundwater Monitoring project will provide information on how nutrients causing Harmful Algal Blooms (HABs) enter Clear Lake.",
    "The Airborne Electromagnetic Survey of Lake County Groundwater Basins project will utilize technology previously used to study at-risk groundwater basins.",
    "Scotts Valley Aquifer Evaluation will assess local aquifer conditions and storage potential to ensure water security for residents.",
    "The web-based clearinghouse will compile water quality data and reports from multiple entities and improve citizen science initiatives.",
    "Climate change has significantly impacted water resources in Lake County, leading to heightened urgency for understanding them.",
    "The Hypolimnetic Oxygenation Pilot Project aims to improve water quality in the Oaks Arm of Clear Lake and has been shown to reduce Harmful Algal Blooms and methyl-mercury production.",
    "Cyanobacteria impacts tourism and recreation on Clear Lake, and reducing Harmful Algal Blooms may enhance public health and economic activity."
  ]
}
```
